title: Smooth Creeper
description: Creeper explosions apply Silk Touch and  drop all blocks
body:
Smooth Creeper alters creeper explosions so that they apply silk touch to all drops and drop all blocks. This makes it easier to patch up creeper craters *and* adds an early-game way to silk touch blocks (although it is a bit messy!).

![Grass and stone items dropping as items from an explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEBs0It1/images/cf08f4f3209e87ca131e4e145e4ac0b884e7bd2e.png)

**Note:** Dropping all blocks is done by making the `mobExplosionDropDecay‌` gamerule default to `false`. If you are adding this to an existing world, you must manually set the gamerule using the command `/gamerule mobExplosionDropDecay false`
